title: Sour Cherry Empanadas
description: Delicious empanadas filled with a sweet and tangy sour cherry filling, perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a bowl, mix together the sour cherries, granulated sugar, almond extract, and lemon zest.
Place a tablespoon of the cherry mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with the beaten egg and fold the dough in half to form a triangle.
Press the edges together to seal the empanada and use a fork to crimp the edges.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with the beaten egg and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
